page_content:
MEES498 Topics in Marine-Estuarine-Environmental Sciences (1-4 Credits)

Lecture and/or laboratory series organized to study a selected area of marine-estuarine-environmental sciences not otherwise considered in formal courses.

MEES601 Applied Environmental Science (2 Credits)

Designed to promote an appreciation of interdisciplinarity in natural and social sciences and to provide exposure to how science can influence and inform ongoing policy and management debates. The course addresses the role of science and scientists in providing information to policy makers and managers on complex environmental challenges. Credit Only Granted for. MEES601 or MEES609A.
